zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Marchant於1523年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾沙特波利時，她的父親Thomas Marchant38歲，母親Mary Coomber38歲。她於1525年與Richard Gunne I在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。她去世於1588年2月17日在她的家鄉享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Marchant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name from Middle English marchaunt ‘merchant, trader, shopkeeper’ (Old French marchand, marchëant).
Altered form of French   Marchand  , a cognate of 1 above.

History: John Marchant (c. 1600–c. 1668) was in Newport, RI, before 1638. In that year he moved to Braintree, MA, then to Watertown, MA (1642), and finally to Yarmouth, MA (1648). His descendants included many sea captains and other prominent people.

variants.name: Marchand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Pierre, Emile, Jacques, Lucien, Normand, Alphonse, Camille, Cecile, Colette.

French: occupational name for a buyer and seller of goods, from Old French march(e)ant, Late Latin mercatans, from Latin mercari ‘to trade’, from merx ‘commerce, exchange, merchandise’. In the Middle Ages the term was used mainly to denote a wholesale dealer. Compare Marchant and Mershon .
English (London): variant of   Marchant  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Marchant was born in 1523, in Saintbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Marchant, was 38 and her mother, Mary Coomber, was 38. She married Richard Gunne I in 1525, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 17 February 1588, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Marchant(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 세인트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Marchant(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Coomber(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Richard Gunne I(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1588년 2월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Marchant родилась в 1523 г. в местности сеинтбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Marchant было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Coomber, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Gunne I в 1525 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 17 февраля 1588 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
